text: Hey there! Just wanted to know if there are any scheduled downtimes we should be aware of this weekend? Thanks!

Dear Support Team, I am currently facing an issue with accessing my account. Despite entering the correct credentials, I am unable to log in. Additionally, I have not received any password reset emails, which I understand could have been sent to my registered email address. This situation is quite concerning, and I would greatly appreciate your prompt assistance in resolving it.
I'm really disappointed with the service lately. The response times have been longer than expected, and it's affecting my workflow.
is the pro plan yearly or is it monthly? I thought it was both?

I'm really frustrated because the app keeps crashing every time I try to upload a photo. My device is brand new, and I’ve already updated everything. Can you help me fix this? Also, I don’t understand why it’s taking so long to get a response from support.

I am extremely disappointed with your service lately. It seems like every time I try to use the app, I encounter some problem or another. Just yesterday, I was trying to access my account to update my payment information but the site was down for maintenance. I waited for hours before giving up, only to find out later that there was no prior notification about this outage on your social media pages. In addition to that, I recently received an email that didn't even pertain to my account! Can you explain why the communication from your team has become so unreliable? This isn't the level of service I signed up for. Please address these ongoing issues.
The app opens sometimes but then crashes. It's either the last update or my device. Can you check?

I’ve been experiencing issues with my account for the last few weeks, and it’s becoming quite frustrating. There were supposed to be some updates that I was looking forward to, but nothing has changed and I still can't access my profile settings properly. It feels like no matter what I do, I can't seem to get a response from support. Can you please look into this for me? It’s really important that I get this sorted out soon.
i thought i cancelled my subscription but i still got charged. pls refund!!!
Hey, quick question - is that pro thing billed monthly or yearly? Also, do you guys have something for students?
I'm really frustated! I tried to log in to my account but it says my email is not recognized. What happened? This is super annoying!
Dear Customer Support, I noticed that I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Could you please process a refund for the duplicate charge? Thank you.
Hey, I can't log in to my accnt, it says my password is wrong but I know it's right. Can u help?
Hey, quick question. Is the subscription auto-renew? If so, how can I turn that off?
I want a refund for my last order. It arrived damaged.
Hey, my app crashes every time I try to log in. I thought I fixed the password, but now it's saying it's incorrect, like what? Why is that?

I placed an order last week and was assured it would arrive within two days. However, it has been over a week, and I have yet to receive any updates regarding the shipment. Can you please provide clarity on my order status?
I just don't get it... why is my order still not here? It was supposed to arrive last week. This is really frustrating.
I was informed by your customer service that the issue would be resolved within 48 hours, yet I find myself still waiting after a week. This inconsistency is quite troubling.

Dear support team, I am writing to request a refund for my recent subscription that auto-renewed despite my prior cancellation. I would appreciate your prompt confirmation of this cancellation and the refund process.
Im having truble accessing my account. It says 'user not found', but I know im using the right email.
I can't log in to my account, it keeps saying invalid password.
